rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the amended petition did not address the following issue (which remains unaddressed since the initial hearing on 05/15/2023): Please state the total amount of the estate cash on hand and provide a proof that the cash including the net proceeds from the sale of the estate real property is fully insured in observance of the FDIC limit or is otherwise held in the form of investment(s) authorized by Probate Code sections 9730 and 10533(a)(2). Also note: No DE-120 form is on file with a proof of service of the amended petition on the person who requested special notice. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLENN PATRICK VALUROSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be addressed: 1. Need further allegation regarding Glenda's objection to the proposed action. 2. Need an authority under which the court can order the administrator to transfer the real property interest that is not subject to the administration. As the corrected I&A sets forth, the only assets subject to the administration are $158,444.73 in cash. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/8/2023 (Wed). The following issues to be cleared seven days prior. (1) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number has not been filed. The form must be filed conventionally. LRSF 14.18.E and 14.59.C.7). (2) Petition #6 and/or #8 to clarify if the decedent was survived by other than one daughter. #8 lists one daughter; however, #6 affirms (f) only not (b). Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
